title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 13–16, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The truth of Nami’s long sacrifice collides with Marine corruption and Arlong’s manipulation.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: If you have no intention of saving this village,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Then get the hell out this instant!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong might attack your ship if you linger around here too long, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: Arlong? Attack our ship? I wonder about that... Chichichi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you still not found it!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We're not looking for a single grain of rice here! She should have 100 million bellii hidden here! It'd be impossible not to find it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!? How could you possibly know how much there is!?

dialogue.speaker: Marine Captain Nezumi
dialogue.text: Hm? Oh, I just had a feeling she'd have that much, chichichi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As workers of the government, we're only doing our natural duty of persecution thieves...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could marines let themselves be ordered around by a pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't tell me the Marines shot her!

dialogue.speaker: Genzo
dialogue.text: What's going on, Gen!? What happened!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This has nothing to do with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So just get the hell off of this island!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you really want your town back that much, little girl?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Fine, then let's make a deal.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: If you can pay the sum of 100 million belli in a single payment, then I'll not only free your village but I'll let you go free as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It doesn't matter how many years it takes, I swear I'll keep my promise!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
